title: DeviceManagementExportJobCreate
description: Request body for creating a new deviceManagementExportJob.

reportName.description: Name of the report to export (e.g., Devices, DevicesWithInventory, DeviceCompliance). The maximum length is 2000 characters.

filter.description: Filters applied on the report. The maximum length is 2000 characters.

select.description: Columns selected from the report. Only valid column names for the specified report are accepted. Maximum 256 column names, each up to 1000 characters.

format.description: Format of the exported report. Defaults to csv.

snapshotId.description: A sessionId or CachedReportConfiguration id. When specified, Filter, Select, and OrderBy cannot also be specified. Maximum 128 characters.

localizationType.description: Configures how the export job is localized. Default is localizedValuesAsAdditionalColumn.
